sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29645" key="du/sxulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δύσχῡλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29645.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with bad juices, ill-savoured</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1009.tlg001:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenocr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
